1221622.name: Awaken Fungi
1221622.summary: Rotmire blooms fungal growths that explode, knock players away, and create fungal minions.

advice.generic: Move out of new fungal growths quickly, then swap to the spawned minions before the next bloom cycle empowers them.
advice.tank: Keep Rotmire positioned so growth dodging does not drag the boss through minion corpse piles.
advice.healer: Expect players clipped by growths to be knocked into follow-up damage or corpse zones.
advice.dps: Dodge the growths first, then kill Shroomlings, Funglings, and Sporecaps before Fungal Bloom.

1221901.name: Awaken Fungi
1221901.summary: The explosion damage from Awaken Fungi growths.

advice.generic: Treat this as preventable growth damage. Move before the fungal bloom detonates.
advice.healer: Clipped players may need quick stabilization before minion or bloom damage overlaps.
advice.dps: Do not finish casts inside a growth marker; the knockback costs more uptime than moving early.

1221901.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Awaken Fungi.

1221781.name: Putrid Fist
1221781.summary: A heavy tank hit that knocks the target upward and applies a stacking Physical vulnerability.

advice.generic: Track this as the main tank-buster sequence.
advice.tank: Use active mitigation or a defensive for high stacks and avoid being knocked into unsafe fungus or vine zones.
advice.healer: Pair tank healing with high Putrid Fist stacks, especially during Fungal Bloom or Pustules.

1222289.name: Putrid Fist
1222289.summary: The stacking Physical damage taken vulnerability left by Putrid Fist.

advice.generic: Treat high stacks as tank danger rather than normal melee pressure.
advice.tank: Call for externals or plan a swap when stacks make the next Putrid Fist unsafe.
advice.healer: Track stack count and pre-load healing before the next tank hit.

1222289.notes: DB2 aura applied by Putrid Fist.

1221637.name: Fungal Bloom
1221637.summary: A 100-energy burst that damages and knocks the raid, empowers fungal minions, and grows Bursting Shrooms from minion corpses.

advice.generic: Clean up minions before Fungal Bloom so corpse-triggered shrooms do not flood the arena.
advice.tank: Keep corpse locations predictable and avoid moving Rotmire through future shroom spawns.
advice.healer: Prepare throughput for the raid hit and any Bursting Shroom follow-up from leftover corpses.
advice.dps: Swap earlier to minions; every corpse left for Bloom can become another raid damage source.

1221965.name: Bursting Shroom
1221965.summary: A shroom grown from a minion corpse during Fungal Bloom that explodes into raid-wide Nature damage.

advice.generic: Ensure the fixated shrooms are grouped up prior to their death. These bursting shrooms spawn on the corpses of the previous shrooms.
advice.healer: Layer healing if several shrooms are expected to detonate close together.
advice.dps: Cleave down the spawned shrooms before they burst, dealing heavy raid-wide damage.

1221644.name: Fungal Frenzy
1221644.summary: Fungal Bloom empowers minions, increasing their damage and movement speed while making them immune to crowd control and interrupts.

advice.generic: Do not let minions survive into Fungal Bloom. Frenzied minions are much harder to control.
advice.tank: Be ready for faster minions after Bloom if add cleanup is late.
advice.healer: Expect sharper random damage when empowered minions stay alive.
advice.dps: Prioritize minions before the empowerment rather than relying on crowd control afterward.

1222088.name: Festering Vines
1222088.summary: Targets several players with damaging vines that slow them, burst on expiration, and leave Writhing Vines behind.

advice.generic: Spread Festering Vines targets away from the raid before expiration and keep future movement paths clear.
advice.healer: Track vine targets, especially if the slow traps them during Fungal Bloom or shroom explosions.
advice.dps: If targeted, move out of the group early and avoid dropping Writhing Vines in the raid path.

1222088.notes: DB2 marks the debuff with a snare mechanic; snare-breaking effects may clear it.

1222122.name: Festering Vines
1222122.summary: The expiration burst from Festering Vines around each affected player.

advice.generic: Give vine targets space before the snap damage resolves.
advice.healer: Expect burst damage if vine targets expire near other players.
advice.dps: Do not stack on a vine target unless a strategy specifically calls for it.

1222122.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Festering Vines expiration.

1222129.name: Writhing Vines
1222129.summary: Ground vines left by Festering Vines that damage players standing in the area.

advice.generic: Drop Writhing Vines away from the group and move out of the area immediately.
advice.tank: Keep boss and minion movement out of vine patches when possible.
advice.healer: Spot heal players trapped by slows or knockbacks, but call movement first.
advice.dps: Do not chase uptime through vine patches.

1221787.name: Bursting Pustules
1221787.summary: Rotmire bursts pustules, damaging the raid and gaining a Rotting Pustules stack for each burst.

advice.generic: Treat Bursting Pustules as a ramp checkpoint. Each burst adds future Rotting Pustules pressure.
advice.tank: Avoid repositioning through bad ground while raid healing catches up.
advice.healer: Plan healing for the direct raid hit and the increasing Rotting Pustules ticks afterward.
advice.dps: Use personals if Pustules overlaps with Bloom, vines, or shroom detonations.

1222278.name: Bursting Pustules
1222278.summary: The raid damage from Bursting Pustules.

advice.generic: Use this damage event to identify Pustules overlap and ramp timing.
advice.healer: Ramp healing before the hit when Rotting Pustules stacks are already high.
advice.dps: Do not add avoidable shroom or vine damage during this raid hit.

1222278.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Bursting Pustules.

1222176.name: Rotting Pustules
1222176.summary: A stacking Rotmire aura that inflicts increasing periodic Nature damage to the raid.

advice.generic: Track Rotting Pustules stacks as the fight's raid-damage ramp.
advice.healer: Save throughput and externals for high stacks or overlaps with Fungal Bloom.
advice.dps: Use defensives as stacks climb, especially when movement mechanics limit healing.

1222284.name: Rotting Pustules
1222284.summary: The periodic raid damage tick from Rotting Pustules stacks.

advice.generic: Use this to spot high-stack Pustules windows and overlap failures.
advice.healer: Stabilize the raid before Bloom or Festering Vines add burst damage.
advice.dps: Personal defensives are valuable when this ticking damage overlaps with movement.

1222284.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Rotting Pustules.

1221714.name: Poison Burst
1221714.summary: A Sporecap burst that damages the raid and applies a stacking Poison DoT.

advice.generic: Control or kill Sporecaps before repeated Poison Burst stacks overwhelm the raid.
advice.healer: Prioritize poison cleanses on high stacks or players taking other Rotmire damage.
advice.dps: Swap to Sporecaps and use stops where available to prevent extra stacks.

1221717.name: Blightshot
1221717.summary: A Sporecap projectile that hits a player with Nature damage.

advice.generic: Use Blightshot as a signal that Sporecaps are free-casting and need control or focus damage.
advice.healer: Spot heal repeated Blightshot targets when Poison Burst stacks are active.
advice.dps: Interrupt, stop, or kill Sporecaps before their casts stack up.

1222684.name: Cross Fertilization
1222684.summary: On Mythic difficulty, a Doom Shroom forms when Shroomling and Fungling corpses are too close during Fungal Bloom.

advice.generic: Separate Shroomling and Fungling corpses before Fungal Bloom to prevent Doom Shrooms.
advice.tank: Help place minion deaths so opposite corpse types do not overlap near the boss path.
advice.healer: Expect extra raid damage if corpse placement causes Doom Shrooms.
advice.dps: Mind where different minion types die; cleave is good only if corpse placement stays controlled.

1222495.name: Bursting Doom Shroom
1222495.summary: A Mythic Doom Shroom explosion that damages the raid and applies an additional Nature DoT.

advice.generic: Prevent Doom Shrooms through corpse separation; if one forms, treat the detonation as a major overlap risk.
advice.healer: Prepare for both the initial raid hit and the follow-up DoT.
advice.dps: Adjust minion deaths before Bloom; cleaning up the corpse pattern prevents this damage.
